title: If you pay a hacker's ransom, chances are that they'll come back for more | TechCrunch
summary: The company said it struck a deal with the hackers, who claimed to have deleted the data, but the company later conceded that a separate hacking group swiped a sample of the company’s stolen data, leaving its customers exposed to potential future…
